CLE.headline: Cleveland plays Atlanta on 4-game win streak
CLE.description: Cleveland Cavaliers (51-29, fourth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Atlanta Hawks (45-35, fifth in the Eastern Conference)

CLE.headline: The NBA's best plays from Wednesday
CLE.description: Check out some of the highlights from Wednesday's slate of games around the NBA.

CLE.headline: Atlanta Hawks vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights
CLE.description: Atlanta Hawks vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights

CLE.headline: Donovan Mitchell and Evan Mobley help Cavaliers hold off Hawks 122-116
CLE.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 31 points, Evan Mobley had 22 points and tied a career high with 19 rebounds, and the Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Atlanta Hawks 122-116 on Wednesday night.

CLE.headline: 2025-26 NBA championship and MVP odds: Lakers' title odds continue to lengthen
CLE.description: The Lakers' championship odds are even longer after the injuries to Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves.
